# The log file name and location can be set in
# etc/mysqlrouter by setting the "filename" option
# in [logger] section as follows:
#
# [logger]
# fillename=var/log/mysqlrouter/mysqlrouter.log
#

/var/log/mysqlrouter/mysqlrouter.log {
        create 600 mysqlrouter mysqlrouter
        notifempty
        daily
        rotate 5
        missingok
        compress
    postrotate
      # only if mysqlrouter is really running
      if [ -f "run/mysqlrouter.pid" ]
      then
        kill -HUP `cat run/mysqlrouter.pid`
      fi
    endscript
}
